output: SELECT p.player_name, ps.pts, ps.season_id FROM player p JOIN player_season ps ON p.player_id = ps.player_id WHERE ps.pts = (SELECT MAX(ps2.pts) FROM player_season ps2 WHERE ps2.season_id = ps.season_id) ORDER BY ps.season_id DESC;

input: players with the worst ft percentage in 2018 min 100 attempts
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg.ft_pct, pg.fta FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id = 22017 AND pg.fta >= 100 ORDER BY pg.ft_pct ASC LIMIT 10;

input: who was bricking free throws the most in 2018
output: SELECT p.player_name, pg.ft_pct, pg.fta FROM player p JOIN player_general_traditional_total pg ON p.player_id = pg.player_id WHERE pg.season_id = 22017 AND pg.fta >= 100 ORDER BY pg.ft_pct ASC LIMIT 5;

input: lakers vs celtics all time head to head not possible without away team data just show lakers record
output: SELECT t.city, t.nickname, SUM(CASE WHEN pgl.wl = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN pgl.wl = 'L' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses FROM team t JOIN player_game_log pgl ON t.team_id = pgl.team_id WHERE t.nickname = 'Lakers' GROUP BY t.city, t.nickname;

input: how many total games has the lakers franchise played
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT g.game_id) AS total_games FROM game g JOIN team t ON g.team_id_home_id = t.team_id WHERE t.nickname = 'Lakers';

input: who had the worst single game shooting in 2022 min 10 shots
output: SELECT p.player_name, pgl.fg_pct, pgl.fga, g.date FROM player p JOIN player_game_log pgl ON p.player_id = pgl.player_id JOIN game g ON pgl.game_id = g.game_id WHERE pgl.season_id = 22021 AND pgl.fga >= 10 ORDER BY pgl.fg_pct ASC LIMIT 10;

input: who went 0 for 10 or worse in a game in 2023
output: SELECT p.player_name, pgl.fgm, pgl.fga, g.date FROM player p JOIN player_game_log pgl ON p.player_id = pgl.player_id JOIN game g ON pgl.game_id = g.game_id WHERE pgl.season_id = 22022 AND pgl.fgm = 0 AND pgl.fga >= 10 ORDER BY pgl.fga DESC;

input: players who went scoreless but played over 30 minutes in 2021
output: SELECT p.player_name, pgl.pts, pgl.min, g.date FROM player p JOIN player_game_log pgl ON p.player_id = pgl.player_id JOIN game g ON pgl.game_id = g.game_id WHERE pgl.season_id = 22020 AND pgl.pts = 0 AND pgl.min >= 30 ORDER BY pgl.min DESC;

input: which team had the most players score in double digits in a single game in 2020
output: SELECT g.game_id, g.date, t.city, t.nickname, COUNT(*) AS players_double_digits FROM game g JOIN player_game_log pgl ON g.game_id = pgl.game_id JOIN team t ON pgl.team_id = t.team_id WHERE pgl.season_id = 22019 AND pgl.pts >= 10 GROUP BY g.game_id, g.date, t.city, t.nickname ORDER BY players_double_digits DESC LIMIT 1;

input: most balanced team scoring wise in one game 2020
output: SELECT g.game_id, g.date, t.city, t.nickname, COUNT(*) AS scorers_in_double_digits FROM game g JOIN player_game_log pgl ON g.game_id = pgl.game_id JOIN team t ON pgl.team_id = t.team_id WHERE pgl.season_id = 22019 AND pgl.pts >= 10 GROUP BY g.game_id, g.date, t.city, t.nickname ORDER BY scorers_in_double_digits DESC LIMIT 5;
